## 🎯 NEEDS EDDY (Can't do without you)

### 1. Google Cloud Console — Calendar Redirect URI
**Time: 2 minutes**
Add this redirect URI to your OAuth client (APIs & Services → Credentials):
```
https://warroom.stuffnthings.io/api/calendar/google/callback
```
If calendar already connects, you may have already done this. Test by disconnecting and reconnecting.

### 2. JWT Secret — Change from Default
**Time: 1 minute**
The JWT secret is `warroom-jwt-secret-2026` (hardcoded default). Set a real one:
```yaml
# In docker-compose.yml, add to backend environment:
JWT_SECRET: "your-random-string-here-at-least-32-chars"
```
Generate one: `openssl rand -hex 32`

### 3. CORS — Lock Down Origins
**Time: 2 minutes**  
Currently `allow_origins=["*"]` — any website can make API requests. Change in `backend/app/main.py`:
```python
allow_origins=[
    "https://warroom.stuffnthings.io",
    "http://localhost:3300",
    "http://192.168.1.94:3300",
],
```

### 4. Email Integration — Gmail API / IMAP Setup
**Time: 30 minutes**
For the email reading feature (scrape inbox for leads, auto-respond to inquiries):
- Option A: Gmail API (best) — enable in Google Cloud Console, add scopes, same OAuth client
- Option B: IMAP — need IMAP credentials for each mailbox
- Which mailboxes? eddy@stuffnthings.io, info@stuffnthings.io, contact@stuffnthings.io?
- I'll build the integration once you pick the approach

### 5. Stripe + Affirm API Keys
**Time: 15 minutes**
For the invoicing/payment feature:
- Stripe: Create account at stripe.com, get API keys (test mode first)
- Affirm: Apply at affirm.com/merchants for payment plans
- Add keys to Settings → API Keys (I'll add the drawer group)

### 6. VoIP Provider Selection
**Time: Research needed**
For recording calls and eventual mobile app:
- Twilio ($0.0085/min) — most popular, has recording + transcription
- Vonage — cheaper, good API
- Plivo — cheapest
Pick one, I'll build the integration

### 7. ElevenLabs API Key (Better Voices)
**Time: 5 minutes**
Current TTS uses edge-tts (free, robotic). ElevenLabs = natural sounding.
- Sign up at elevenlabs.io, get API key
- Free tier: 10K chars/month. Pro: $5/mo for 30K chars
- Add to Settings → API Keys

### 8. Contact Form → Website Integration
**Time: 10 minutes**
Once the contact webhook is built, add this to stuffnthings.io contact form:
```javascript
// POST to your War Room backend
fetch('https://warroom.stuffnthings.io/api/webhooks/contact', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  body: JSON.stringify({ name, email, phone, message, source_url: window.location.href })
})
```

### 9. Team Member Onboarding
**Time: When ready**
Your third team member needs:
- Account created in War Room (Settings → Users)
- Role assigned with proper permissions
- Access to warroom.stuffnthings.io
